arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB subnet group.

description.description: A description of the DB subnet group.

id.description: The ID of the DB subnet group.

status.description: The status of the DB subnet group.

subnet_ids.description: A set of subnet IDs associated with the DB subnet group.

supported_network_types.description: The network types supported by the DB subnet group.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC containing the DB subnet group.
